title: Calonemorchis longicauda
taxonomy: Calonemorchis longicauda is a species of orchid in the subfamily Orchidinae. It belongs to the genus Calonemorchis, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants, consisting of over 30,000 species. Within the Orchidaceae family, the Orchidinae subfamily contains around 2,000 species. Calonemorchis longicauda is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
